title: FITNESS - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides fitness activities, equipment, a gymnasium, and a rock wall. Fitness classes are available for all ages and fitness levels. Personal trainers available. 1865 Bill Frey Drive NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 798-4821 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 566-5762 Main phone (503) 585-6688 Family Services Main phone (503) 798-4821 Fitness Reception (503) 566-5762 Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in; day or membership pass FEES: Varies by service. Scholarships available. DOCUMENTS: Current photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5:30am-9pm, Saturday 7am-9pm, Sunday 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Cherriots bus routes 3, 11, 23 Services: Exercise Classes/Groups Fitness Equipment and Accessories General Recreational Activities/Sports Recreation Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT PAYMENT ASSISTANCE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ARTS & EDUCATION LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SWIMMING FACILITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
